abilities.description: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing 30%/45%/60%/75%+65/70/75/80 of Phantom Assassin's attack damage as physical damage and applying attack effects from items and abilities.
params: Passive ComponentCoup de Grace Proc Chance: 34% ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 41%)
abilities.name: Stifling Dagger
abilities.story: The first skill learned by the Sisters of the Veil often signals an incoming hit.

abilities.description: Teleports to a unit, friendly or enemy, and grants bonus attack speed while attacking if it's an enemy unit.
abilities.name: Phantom Strike
abilities.story: Mortred's silken veil is the last thing her unfortunate target sees.

abilities.description: Phantom Assassin focuses inward, increasing her ability to evade enemy attacks. Can be activated to blur her body, causing her to be impossible to see until near enemy heroes.
params: Passive ComponentEvasion: 20%/30%/40%/50% ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 45%/55%/65%/75%)[picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] Current Cooldowns Skip per Kill: 100%
abilities.name: Blur
abilities.story: Meditation allows a Veiled Sister to carefully anticipate her opponents in combat.

abilities.description: Phantom Assassin releases sharp blades around her, dealing a percentage of each victim's max health on impact and applying Break.
abilities.name: Fan of Knives

abilities.description: Phantom Assassin refines her combat abilities, acquiring a chance of gaining Deadly Focus with each attack. When attacking with Deadly Focus, Phantom Assassin will consume the buff and guarantee a critical hit. Stifling Dagger has a bonus chance to cause Deadly Focus.
abilities.name: Coup de Grace
abilities.story: A divine strike, Mortred honors her opponent by choosing them for death.

description: Blinks onto her foes with critical strikes. Of all the assassins raised by the Sisters of the Veil, only one is known by name: Mortred. Through meditation and prophecy, the order identifies the next target to die at her hands. Attacks miss against the Phantom Assassin as she Blurs into her surroundings, traversing undetected across the land to catch her victims unaware. She opens the encounter with a Stifling Dagger, thrown from the shadows, then leaps upon the crippled target to deliver a flurry of Phantom Strikes, followed by a Fan of Knives hurled into all directions. Without warning, any one of her attacks could be the Coup de Grâce, leaving behind only the blood-splattered ground as testament to her efficiency.  Carry Escape  Cape, Female, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Mortred's name is derived from Mordred, a character in the Arthurian legend who betrayed and fought King Arthur at the Battle of Camalann.
